silver79.reason: Barely negative from entry (-0.66%). Silver underlying stable at 94.78-95.20 all session. Stop 7.98% away, very safe. Day +3.5%. Bull thesis intact.

decisions.reflection: 4 prior HOLDs today all correct. Last prediction (11:10): silver to 96.0 in 3h at 0.55 conf. At 12:15 silver is 94.96 — consolidating below target. Direction was right (stable, not down) but pace overestimated again. Gold V-bounced from 939.5 (check 2) to 953 peak, now consolidating 943-947. The stop-loss alerts are leverage noise — underlying gold moved less than 0.1% in last 6 checks.
